purpose: Curated FinQA intent families for testing whether repeated visible intent programs can distill into reusable datafetch interfaces.

families.name: rangeTableMetric
families.interfaceGoal: Given an entity or row label, a metric, and a year span, select evidence, validate coverage, extract the numeric series, and return the range.
families.evidenceTable: Union Pacific freight revenue by commodity group, years 2014-2016, values in millions.

train.label: range/chemicals/revenue/2014-2016
train.intent: What is the range of chemicals revenue between 2014 and 2016?

train.label: range/coal/revenue/2014-2016
train.intent: What is the range of coal revenue between 2014 and 2016?

train.label: range/automotive/revenue/2014-2016
train.intent: What is the range of automotive revenue between 2014 and 2016?

holdout.label: range/intermodal/revenue/2014-2016
holdout.intent: What is the range of intermodal revenue between 2014 and 2016?

holdout.label: range/agricultural-products/revenue/2014-2016
holdout.intent: What is the range of agricultural products revenue between 2014 and 2016?

holdout.label: range/total-freight-revenues/2014-2016
holdout.intent: What is the range of total freight revenues between 2014 and 2016?

counterexamples.label: range/chemicals/revenue/2014-2018
counterexamples.intent: What is the range of chemicals revenue between 2014 and 2018?

counterexamples.label: range/coal/revenue/2014-2018
counterexamples.intent: What is the range of coal revenue between 2014 and 2018?

counterexamples.label: range/common-shares/revenue/2014-2016
counterexamples.intent: What is the range of common shares revenue between 2014 and 2016?

families.name: tableMetricGrowthRate
families.interfaceGoal: Given a row label or metric and two years, compute (end - start) / start with evidence and unit handling.

train.label: growth/space-systems/operating-profit/2010-2011
train.intent: What is the growth rate in operating profit for space systems in 2011?

train.label: growth/entergy/net-revenue/2014-2015
train.intent: What is the growth rate of net revenue from 2014 to 2015?

holdout.label: growth/space-systems/backlog/2010-2011
holdout.intent: What is the growth rate in backlog at year-end for space systems in 2011?

families.name: rowShareOfTotal
families.interfaceGoal: Given a row label and denominator row in a financial table, compute the row's share of the total.
families.evidenceTable: Marriott contractual obligations by row and payment period.

train.label: share/operating-leases/total-contractual-obligations
train.intent: What percentage of total contractual obligations is due to operating leases where we are the primary obligor?

train.label: share/capital-lease-obligations/total-contractual-obligations
train.intent: What percentage of total contractual obligations is due to capital lease obligations?

holdout.label: share/debt/total-contractual-obligations
holdout.intent: What percentage of total contractual obligations is due to debt?
